name: customer_olap_pivot
description: Customer-OLAP pivot table over customers/orders/products CSV files. Multi-dimensional grouping with pre-defined dimensions (customer_segment, region, etc.) and measures (total_revenue, order_count, etc.). Data sourced from worker domain_data/duckdb.

rows.description: Row dimensions. Available: customer_segment, customer_tier, region, country, acquisition_channel, age_group, product_category, product_name, payment_method, sales_rep, order_date, signup_date, order_year, order_month, order_quarter

measures.description: Measures to aggregate. Available: order_count, customer_count, total_revenue, total_quantity, avg_order_value, total_discount, total_shipping, avg_discount_pct, gross_profit, profit_margin

filters.description: Filter conditions as key-value pairs (lists allowed for IN-style filters)

order_by.description: Column to sort by (prefix with - for DESC)
